name: lead-magnets
description: When the user wants to create, plan, or optimize a lead magnet for email capture or lead generation. Also use when the user mentions "lead magnet," "gated content," "content upgrade," "downloadable," "ebook," "cheat sheet," "checklist," "template download," "opt-in," "freebie," "PDF download," "resource library," "content offer," "email capture content," "Notion template," "spreadsheet template," or "what should I give away for emails." Use this for planning what to create and how to distribute
author: coreyhaines31
summary_zh: 帮你策划和优化引流赠品来获取邮箱的工具。想用电子书、模板等免费资源换订阅，或不知道送什么、怎么分发时，用它就对了。
